query:
-- Verificar os cupons de fidelidade ativos (não usados) do cliente
SELECT id, code, status, usedCount FROM coupons 
WHERE code LIKE 'FID%' AND status = 'active' AND usedCount = 0
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
